# To Do - Weekly

## Weekly Reminders

### Week 1:

 1) Check the [NCSU Academic Calendar](https://studentservices.ncsu.edu/calendars/academic/) to note important dates (e.g., Wellness Days, Spring/Fall Break, Drop/Revision Deadline), so that you can plan your instruction/schedule accordingly.
 
 2) Your course syllabus should be in your `Course Folder` - [Access the Link Here](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1BfmKDDVHphxg9P5aBqG5MKlu0ZaOudI4i4zswpZXQI0/edit?usp=sharing).
 
 3) Send out [DSA Course Feedback Questionnaire: Part 1 of 3 - Fall 2026]{.NCSUred} (Provide your students with the link here: [https://forms.gle/FK8k9H1GkZu7QFPZ9](https://forms.gle/FK8k9H1GkZu7QFPZ9)).
 
 -  ✅ Provide 5 minutes of class time for completion.
 
### Week 2:

 1) Notify students about the [Course Collaboration Leaders Support & More](https://datascienceacademy.ncsu.edu/courses/course-collaboration-leaders/) resource, and add this to your moodle page/course management system.
 
 2) **Research Consent Forms**. During Week 2 a DSA representative may come to your classroom. Please plan to allow five minutes at the end of the week 2 class for this representative to speak to students about the DSA research consent process. You will be asked to leave the room (or Zoom space) during this presentation to preserve students' confidentiality. 

  NOTE: As with the student reflections, please encourage participation in completing the consent forms. Students will have the option to consent or decline. A link will be provided so that you can relay this to students who have not completed the form, and/or were not present in week 2.
 
### Week 3:

 1) Remind students about the [Course Collaboration Leaders Support & More](https://datascienceacademy.ncsu.edu/courses/course-collaboration-leaders/) resource.

 2) DSA Course Feedback Questionnaire: Part 1 of 3 de-Identified feedback/responses will be returned to you.

### Week 4:

 1) Suggestion (if not already done): introduce course project, expectations, and how it is/will be integrated into/throughout the course. 

### Week 5:

 1) Remind students about the Course Collaboration Leaders Support & More resource.

### Week 6:

 1) Send out [DSA Course Feedback Questionnaire: Part 2 of 3 - Fall 2026]{.NCSUred} (Provide your students with the link here: [https://forms.gle/PtTnpQXboAvW8VYB8](https://forms.gle/PtTnpQXboAvW8VYB8)).
 
  -  ✅ Provide 5 minutes of class time for completion.
 
### Week 7:

 1) **Progress Reports**. Please refer to this link [Academic Progress Reporting](https://dasa.ncsu.edu/faculty-resources/academic-progress-reporting/). Please complete a report for any student for whom you may be concerned (e.g., not attending, not completing assignments, at risk for not successfully completing the course, etc.). Instructions on completing these reports through mypack portal are available at the link above.
 
 - ✅  Please submit any related student reports on or before this week.
 
 - ✅  Please notify the Teaching Coordinator of any outstanding concerns.
 
 2) Remind students to complete **DSA Course Feedback Questionnaire: Part 2 of 3** by the end of the week.
 
  - ✅ Provide 5 minutes of class time for completion.

### Week 8 - Week 10:

 1) Remind students about the Course Collaboration Leaders Support & More resource.
 
 2) **DSA Course Feedback Questionnaire: Part 2 of 3** de-Identified feedback/responses will be returned to you.

### Week 11:

 - (if not already done): Communicate Final Project Plan (e.g., weeks due, presentations/reports criteria, etc.).

### Week 12:

1) Send out [DSA Course Feedback Questionnaire: Part 3 of 3 - Fall 2026]{.NCSUred} (Provide your students with the link here: [https://forms.gle/n77cAs6QdnzKQDSe6](https://forms.gle/n77cAs6QdnzKQDSe6)).

 -  ✅ Provide 5 minutes of class time for completion.

### Week 13:

1) Add the Director of Data Science and AI Academic Programs to your course management space with administrative access (e.g., Moodle as a "hidden instructor" and non-expiring time frame).

 - In moodle, at the "My current courses" section, scroll to your current course and... 
      - click on the "gears" icon,
      - scroll down to "users and roster," and click "edit,"
      - go to "add a person by name or unityID," and type in djstokes, and search
      - for "role" select "hidden instructor" and add the "begin date,"… you should be able to leave end date blank (non-expiring).

### Week 14 - 16:

1) Refer to the [NCSU Academic Calendar](https://studentservices.ncsu.edu/calendars/academic/) to see when final grades are due. Refer to this link [Grade Roster](https://sis.emas.ncsu.edu/faculty/faculty-center/#grades) for how to submit grades. 

2) Add all student work to your **Course Folder**, assignments and project(s) (Find your class link here: [Course Documentation Folder Links - Fall 2026](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1BfmKDDVHphxg9P5aBqG5MKlu0ZaOudI4i4zswpZXQI0/edit?usp=sharing)).

-  ✅ Complete the following form: 
    - [Instructor Course and Work Collection Documentation - Fall 2026](https://forms.gle/EZbAB9R8btpNZC5V6)
    - [DSA Instructors - ADAPT model Information - 10 CLEs Perspectives & Implementation - Fall 2026](https://forms.gle/ZEv9MpUCY2YeDwxn7)
